75752.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
75752.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

75753.title: Gold! Greatest Hits Of The 80s
75753.description: Pencil us in because we've organised the greatest hits of the '80s for you...you're welcome!

75754.title: Forever 80s
75754.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

75755.title: 40 No Solo: Only 80s Groups!
75755.description: We've gone through all of our favourite hits and have selected 40 of the best tracks from some of the biggest groups of the 80s! Enjoy!

75756.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1986!
75756.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1986!

75757.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
75757.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

77545.title: ... So 80s!
77545.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
